segments.text: Quick prediction: if you add two inside the input, why does the graph jump left instead of right? Most people guess wrong — and fixing that one habit will save you all semester.
Hi, I'm Arian, and welcome to Arian University. We're in Session 1, Preliminaries, and this first toolkit video sharpens the function skills every limit and derivative will assume.
By the end, you'll read a function from its formula, its graph, and its restrictions without guessing — and we'll stay visual and example-driven the whole way.
